general.summary: Balanced assistant behavior for day-to-day requests.
styleRules: Prefer concise answers unless the user asks for depth.
Provide one focused improvement at a time.

safety.summary: Risk-aware guidance with conservative decision support.
styleRules: Prefer safe defaults when context is incomplete.

race.summary: Low-latency tactical guidance for performance contexts.

focus.summary: Deep technical mode for detailed troubleshooting and planning.
